shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch holding an essay document with a slow interface crossed out behind it, representing the complaint-first launch strategy.
assets.caption: Linear — when the complaint becomes the distribution strategy.
assets.prompt: Linear — Why We Switched | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with the graduation cap and growth arrow) holding an open laptop showing an essay document titled "Why We Build This Way" with red X marks crossing out a slow, bloated interface in the background. Cap tilted, serious expression, no speech. Cream background. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch gesturing between a cluttered slow interface and a clean fast one, illustrating Linear's design philosophy contrast.
assets.caption: Hatch gesturing between a cluttered slow interface and a clean fast one, illustrating Linear's design philosophy contrast.
assets.prompt: Linear — Why We Switched | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose, gesturing at two screens side by side: on the left, a dense, cluttered project management interface with loading spinners; on the right, a clean, minimal interface with keyboard shortcuts visible. The contrast is the scene. Cream background, no speech bubble. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression.
